assertions.title: Planning prerequisites are distinguished from apply-only prerequisites

steps.action: Review the fail-closed dry-run captures with authoritative challenge discovery intentionally unavailable and with member resolution intentionally unavailable.
steps.expected: Dry-run should resolve to `unresolved` with an explicit prerequisite reason instead of fabricating zero skips or a safe create/reuse decision.
steps.observed: The authoritative-discovery run reported `decision=unresolved` with reason `authoritative-existing-v6-discovery-unavailable`; the member-resolution run reported `decision=unresolved` with reason `target-member-resolution-unavailable`.

steps.action: Compare those fail-closed captures to the restored-env dry-runs for rounds 10815 and 17948.
steps.expected: Once prerequisites are available, dry-run should emit populated partitions and stable decisions.
steps.observed: Current and archived dry-runs for 10815/17948 emitted populated resource/submission/final/provisional partitions, matched challenge ids, and stable skip counts instead of unresolved output.

evidence.consoleErrors: Expected warning-only fail-closed messages for unreachable DB/member lookup in the negative-prerequisite runs.
evidence.network: Dry-run CLI only for prerequisite-negative checks; no writes were performed.

steps.action: Compare dry-run for an existing-v6 round with and without a supplemental `--existing-state-file` snapshot.
steps.expected: Decision and matched challenge id should remain authoritative while delta counts may be enriched by the snapshot.
steps.observed: For round 13897, the decision stayed `reuse/backfill-only` with the same matched challenge id; only supplemental alreadyPresent/toImport counts changed when the snapshot was supplied.

steps.action: Inspect current existing-v6 dry-runs for 10815 and 17948.
steps.expected: Entity-level deltas should be broken out by phases/resources/submissions/finalScores/provisionalScores.
steps.observed: Both current dry-runs exposed separate per-entity deltas and partitions rather than an opaque reuse result.

evidence.network: Validated using archived live dry-run evidence plus the current shared-env dry-runs.

assertions.title: Resource planning reconciles resolvable registrants and missing-member skips

steps.action: Inspect the round-10815 dry-run resource partitions and planned skip records.
steps.expected: `toCreate + alreadyPresent + missing-member` should reconcile exactly to the eligible registrant total and expose per-member missing-member records for the resource surface.
steps.observed: Round 10815 reported `eligibleRegistrants=836` with resources `toCreate=1`, `alreadyPresent=827`, and `missingMember=8`; the planned skip records included per-member `missing-member` entries whose affected surfaces included `resource`.

assertions.title: Submission planning excludes examples and quantifies missing-member skips

steps.action: Inspect the round-10815 submission partitions in dry-run output.
steps.expected: The plan should separate example rows, imported/no-op rows, and missing-member submission skips so totals reconcile to legacy non-example submissions.
steps.observed: Round 10815 reported `legacyNonExample=1445`, `legacyExampleFiltered=2424`, `alreadyPresent=1444`, and `missingMember=1`, with a per-submission missing-member planned skip record for legacySubmissionId `35348310001`.

assertions.title: Final and provisional score plans quantify imported and skipped subsets

steps.action: Inspect 10815 dry-run output for fallback-heavy score partitions.
steps.expected: Final and provisional streams should separate imported/no-op, missing-member, and other explicit skip reasons.
steps.observed: Round 10815 reported final scores `legacyFinalCandidates=283`, `alreadyPresent=266`, `missingMember=2`, `explicitSkips=15` (`finalist-without-attachable-submission`), and provisional scores `legacyNonExample=1445`, `alreadyPresent=1444`, `missingMember=1`.

steps.expected: The score-rich fixture should show the imported/no-op subset and missing-member subset without explicit unattachable-finalist skips.
steps.observed: Round 17948 reported finals `81 = 45 alreadyPresent + 36 missingMember + 0 explicitSkips` and provisional `700 = 370 alreadyPresent + 330 missingMember + 0 explicitSkips`.

assertions.title: Rerun planning classifies imported work as no-op and preserved skips as stable

steps.action: Review the linked-count orchestration verification for existing-v6 round 13897.
steps.expected: A fully imported reused round should report no-op rerun classification with stable skip identities and zero toCreate deltas.
steps.observed: Two consecutive dry-runs for 13897 both reported `rerunClassification=no-op`, all entity `toCreate` deltas at 0, and identical planned skip identity/reason/surface sets (47 records).

steps.action: Re-run current dry-run on score-rich round 17948.
steps.expected: Current live output should still classify the fully imported round as no-op.
steps.observed: Current round-17948 dry-run reported `decision=reuse/backfill-only` and `rerunClassification=no-op` with all `toCreate` values at 0.

evidence.network: Current dry-run plus archived live no-op rerun evidence from the shared dev environment.

assertions.title: Missing-member skips are distinguished from other skip reasons

steps.action: Inspect the dry-run skipped-file metadata and planned skip records for 10815.
steps.expected: The report should distinguish `missing-member` from non-missing-member skip reasons and identify the skipped-file artifact.
steps.observed: Round 10815 dry-run identified skipped artifact path(s) and reason codes `missing-member` plus `finalist-without-attachable-submission`; planned skip records included affected surfaces and per-member counts for each reason.

evidence.network: Dry-run CLI only for planning evidence; apply artifact inspected read-only.

summary: Validated 7 planning assertions for participant-scores: all passed. Evidence covered fail-closed prerequisite handling, authoritative existing-state classification, exact resource/submission/score partitions for 10815 and 17948, stable no-op rerun planning on fully imported rounds, and distinct skip reasons plus skipped-artifact metadata.
